creator: glimp@live.com
text:
* Specific Problem *

Once I issue "pkg_create -b cups-base-1.4.4" I get the following error message and pkg_create exits (shell showing exit status 2):

"
tar: etc/cups/cupsd.conf.N: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
"

* Cause *

As of my tests HERE, "cupsd.conf.N" is missing because it has been renamed "cupsd.conf.O" when the first changes in "cupsd.conf" happened through the CUPS web interface.

How-To-Repeat: pkg_create -b cups-base-1.4.4
